title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
